message:
feat(demo): add new experimental demo screens

New Screens:
- 3d_data.rs: 3D data visualization with ASCII art projection
- accessibility_panel.rs: screen reader compatibility demo with
  ARIA-like announcements and focus management
- command_palette_lab.rs: interactive command palette customization
  with real-time fuzzy matching tuning
- hyperlink_playground.rs: OSC 8 hyperlink testing with various
  URL schemes and terminal compatibility checks
- inline_mode_story.rs: demonstration of inline/embedded terminal
  mode for partial-screen TUI applications
- layout_inspector.rs: visual debugger for flex layout with
  constraint visualization
- markdown_live_editor.rs: split-pane markdown editor with
  instant preview
- quake.rs: Easter egg Quake-style drop-down terminal demo
- widget_builder.rs: drag-and-drop widget compositor for
  prototyping TUI layouts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
